{"step_by_step_thinking": "The documents mention that the zygomatic bone articulates with the frontal bone, maxillary bone, and nasal bone. Specifically, the zygomaticofrontal suture connects the zygomatic bone to the frontal bone, the zygomaticomaxillary suture connects the zygomatic bone to the maxillary bone, and the zygomatic process of the zygomatic bone articulates with the nasal bone. However, there is no mention of the zygomatic bone articulating with the temporal bone.", "answer_choice": "D"}
